title: Thoughts of cancer curing video series
body:
Apparently Google ratted to Facebook about my searches, and now I'm getting cancer ads. 

But I saw this interesting video series called "Square one cancer coaching program".  It's supposed to begin in the middle of September and go in for ten days. It gave a link to Chrisbeatcancer.com.  There are ten videos that show one a day from 9 am - 9 am eastern time.  And they're FREE!! (Probably have to pay to find out the important stuff).

Has anyone heard of this, or know anything about it?  I signed up; so I imagine I'm going to be getting a lot of cancer ads in my email, too. These ads actually act like the cancer itself. Has anyone noticed?  And Google is the lymph system.
